metadata.description: 메인 루프 Technoking 1명이 스킬을 백그라운드로 병렬 디스패치하는 비차단 오케스트레이션 플러그인

plugins.name: workflows
plugins.description: Non-blocking Technoking orchestration: skill-dispatch, parallel git-flow worktrees, ticket model, codex review. Stack-agnostic core.

plugins.name: stack-kotlin-spring
plugins.description: Kotlin + Spring Boot overlay: core conventions, data access, testing. Layers on the workflows core.

plugins.name: stack-nextjs
plugins.description: Next.js (App Router) + TypeScript overlay: core conventions, data fetching, testing. Layers on the workflows core.
